action.description:
Introduced by Senators Larson, Carpenter, Wall, Roys, Dassler-Alfheim, Keyeski and Spreitzer; 
cosponsored by Representatives Snodgrass, Tenorio, Miresse, Sinicki, Kirsch, Johnson, Udell, Moore Omokunde, Bare, Billings, Roe, Arney, Fitzgerald, Brown, McCarville, Stroud, Subeck, Palmeri and Stubbs
